mapper.select:
SELECT a.ID, a.PARENT_CODE, a.BERTH_CODE, a.BERTH_NAME, a.BERTH_LONG, a.STATUS, a.CARGO_INFO, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.UPDATE_TIME,a.WORK_AREA_CD, (select BERTH_NAME from M_BERTH where BERTH_CODE = a.PARENT_CODE) as PARENT_NAME FROM M_BERTH a
a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_BERTH(ID, PARENT_CODE, BERTH_CODE, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_LONG, STATUS, WORK_AREA_CD, CARGO_INFO, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthLong, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_BERTH SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PARENT_CODE = #{parentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_CODE = #{berthCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_NAME = #{berthName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_LONG = #{berthLong,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_INFO = #{cargoInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_AREA_CD = #{workAreaCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, BOLLARD_CODE, BOLLARD_NAME, LON, LAT, BERTH_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_BERTH_BOLLARD where BERTH_ID = #{berthId}
and BOLLARD_NAME LIKE #{bollardName}

SELECT ID, BOLLARD_CODE, BOLLARD_NAME, LON, LAT, BERTH_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_BERTH_BOLLARD
id = #{id}
select BERTH_CODE, BERTH_NAME, WORK_AREA_CD from M_BERTH where PARENT_CODE is null
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_BERTH_BOLLARD(ID, BOLLARD_CODE, BOLLARD_NAME, LON, LAT, BERTH_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bollardCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bollardName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lat, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_BERTH_BOLLARD SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BOLLARD_CODE = #{bollardCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BOLLARD_NAME = #{bollardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LON = #{lon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, LAT = #{lat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BERTH_ID = #{berthId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: select BOLLARD_NAME as "label", ID as "value" from M_BERTH_BOLLARD where BERTH_ID = #{berthId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
